titleStmt.title: SII 16.323: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 323. (A.R. No. 305 of 1926.) CHINNAKŌṬLA, DHARMAVARAM TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into a shed in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1551, Śukla, Āśvīja śu. 15 corresponding to 1629 A.D., September 22, (Tuesday).

The record is fragmentary. It seems to state that, when the king was ruling from Vellūru, Veṅkaṭapati-nāyaka, son of Veṅkaṭādri and grandson of Liṅgana of Kōṭapāḍu granted some lands (?) in a village (name lost) in Chiramāgāṇi obtained by him as amara from Pemmasāni Inumaḍi Timmā-nāyaka in respect of a tank constructed by Chika-voḍeyalu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayā
bhyudaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu
1551 Agunēṭi śuklasaṁvatsara Āśvīja śu 15 lu
śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa
śrīvīra rāmadēvarāyalayavāru vellū
ri paṭṭaṇamaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛthvīsā
ṁmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu
[Anumūri] gōtrapavitrulaina kōṭapāṭi liṁ
gganagāri pautrulaina veṁkaṭādrigāri putṛlaina . ve
ṁkaṭapatināyanigāru vēIṁcina śilāśāsanaṁ
kramameṭlaṁnnanu māku peṁmasāni yinumaḍi ti
ṁmānāyanigāru Amaranāyaṁkarānaku pāliṁ
cina guttirājyaṁ ciramāgāṇiki celle pina
māna cikavaḍiyalu kaṭiṁcina cervu nimi
Digital edition of SII 16.323 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
